## Name
suppression-single:example

## Synopsis
```text
/suppression-single:example
```

## Description
This command demonstrates single-rule suppression.

## Implementation

<!-- skillsaw-disable content-weak-language -->
Try to read the configuration file and consider using the default values
where possible. You should probably validate the input first.
<!-- skillsaw-enable content-weak-language -->

1. Parse the input arguments
2. Execute the main operation
3. Return the result
